name: Peach Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Firmly Packed Light Brown Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over peaches; let stand until skins can be easily removed.
2. Dip in cold water, peel.
3. Remove pits and red fibers; cut into chunks.
4. Place immediately in vinegar water to prevent browning.
5. In a saucepan combine brown sugar and the next 4 ingredients (honey, white vinegar, mace). Add cloves and cinnamon tied in cheesecloth bag.
6. Drain peaches; add to syrup. Simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
7. Remove spice bag. Continue simmering while quickly packing 1 clean hot jar at a time, filling to within 1/2 inch of the top, making sure syrup covers fruit.
8. Seal each jar immediately. Process for 5 minutes in boiling water bath.
9. Make 4 - 5 half-pints
